testcase.name: test_valid_phone_returns_200_with_dev_otp
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter10_hardening.py:67: in test_valid_phone_returns_200_with_dev_otp assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.error: tests/test_iter7_team_subs_support.py:41: in admin_token return _login(ADMIN_PHONE) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_iter7_team_subs_support.py:25: in _login r.raise_for_status() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1167: in raise_for_status raise HTTPError(http_error_msg, response=self) E requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: https://fresh-feast-app-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/send-otp
